title: Architecture matters for multi-agent security
whyItMatters: A summary of our ICML 2026 paper, Architecture Matters for Multi-Agent Security ( Ben Hagag, William L. Anderson , Christian Schroeder de Witt , Sarah Scheffler ). The scenarios and experiments were built on Orbit, a multi-agent security experimentation framework we'll release v0 of soon. Benchmark adaptations and code are on GitHub . Orbit is very much sti…
